validationMessages.provisioningMode.required: Choose Hosted MKS or Node provisioning before continuing.
validationMessages.mksClusterName.required: Cluster name is required for hosted MKS.
validationMessages.mksClusterName.pattern: Cluster name must contain only letters, numbers, and dashes.
validationMessages.mksClusterName.length: Cluster name must be between 3 and 63 characters.
validationMessages.mksVersion.required: Hosted MKS requires a Kubernetes version.
validationMessages.mksNodepoolFlavor.required: Hosted MKS requires a node pool flavor.
validationMessages.mksNodepoolDesiredNodes.required: Hosted MKS requires a node pool size.
validationMessages.mksNodepoolDesiredNodes.range: Node pool size must be between 1 and 100.
validationMessages.region.required: Region is required for node provisioning.
validationMessages.region.pattern: Region may only contain letters, numbers, and dashes.
validationMessages.flavor.required: Flavor is required for node provisioning.
validationMessages.flavor.pattern: Flavor may only contain letters, numbers, dots, and dashes.
validationMessages.image.required: Image is required for node provisioning.
validationMessages.image.pattern: Image may only contain letters, numbers, dots, underscores, and dashes.
